text: I stand in a quiet, modern hallway, observing the sleek geometry and transparent barriers that separate me from the vivid, creative energy of the R+D space beyond. Inside, the wall celebrates research and development—two forces I associate with curiosity and boundless possibility. It feels like a threshold between logic and imagination. I sense anticipation, as if I am on the verge of discovery, humbled by the organized chaos of human innovation. There is an invitation here to ponder, to cross boundaries, and to contribute.
